overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 walking through a futuristic industrial district. The player moves along a graffiti-covered concrete sidewalk beside a multi-lane road with orange barriers, passing pedestrians and approaching a large spherical industrial structure at an intersection under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with traffic barriers and overhead power lines

events.description: first pedestrians appear walking towards camera in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial sidewalk next to orange traffic barriers

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
red and white striped concrete barriers separating sidewalk from road
crisscrossing electrical wires suspended above the street
tall pole with orange-lit lamp fixture
large elevated sign structure with orange framework visible in distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit industrial sidewalk bordered by a graffiti-covered concrete building on the right and orange traffic barriers on the left. Overhead power lines crisscross the sky. The camera moves forward at walking pace, and pedestrians first appear in the distance around the 8-second mark, walking towards the camera.

events.description: pedestrian in distinctive pink hat and overalls passes closely by on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing pink hat and yellow shirt walking past the camera

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the industrial sidewalk, now passing closer to pedestrians. A notable pedestrian in a pink hat and overalls passes by on the right around 22 seconds. The distant billboard structure grows larger ahead, and the graffiti on the right wall becomes more detailed and colorful as the camera approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with spherical industrial structure

events.description: approaching intersection with large spherical industrial building becoming visible on the right
turning right towards building entrance with steps

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and approaching the spherical structure, then turning toward the building entrance

notable_agents.action: white van driving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: massive metallic spherical industrial building with external scaffolding and pipes
painted white pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
vertical traffic signal showing red light
concrete steps leading to doorway in graffiti-covered wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection where a massive spherical industrial structure dominates the right side. The camera crosses the asphalt crosswalk, passing a white van on the left, with traffic lights visible. As the camera moves forward, the spherical building grows larger, and the segment ends with a turn toward a graffiti-covered building entrance with concrete steps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a sunlit industrial sidewalk that gradually opens into a wide, bustling intersection dominated by massive architecture. It begins by moving forward past a graffiti-covered concrete building and orange traffic barriers under a web of overhead power lines. As the camera advances, the distance closes between the viewer and oncoming pedestrians, including a figure in a pink hat and overalls, while the colorful street art on the right wall becomes increasingly detailed. The scene then expands into a broad intersection where the camera crosses an asphalt crosswalk past a white van and traffic lights, bringing a colossal spherical industrial structure into full view. Finally, the movement concludes by turning toward the concrete steps of a graffiti-covered building entrance.
